COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 5 --

YouTubers tend to have a more dedicated brand
following than most Instagram influencers. In this
lesson, I’ll teach you how to leverage the power of
YouTube influencers to increase conversions for your
brand.
Types of YouTube Videos
❏ 	Reviews
❏ 	Most Recommended
❏ 	How-To’s
❏ 	Tutorials
❏ 	Joint Giveaways
❏ 	Unboxing videos
YouTube Benefits
• 	Evergreen Content
• 	SEO
• 	Influencer Conversion Rate
• 	UTM Tracking
Reducing Cost
• 	Pay influencer via an affiliate code
• 	Don’t take the influencer’s initial price
• 	Negotiate long-term agreements
• 	Get a cross-platform deal
Influencer Discovery
• 	Perform a keyword search for topics similar to
your product
• 	Find influencers for other brands in your
category
• 	Use the “Up Next” sidebar to find related videos
• 	Search featured lists of YouTubers in your topic
area
LESSON:
NAVIGATING YOUTUBE
INFLUENCERS
MODULE:
ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Decide whether or not you’re going to explore
influencer marketing on YouTube.
❏ 	Manually search influencers in your category.
❏ 	Decide on the type of videos you’ll create.
❏ 	Write your outreach email.
❏ 	Start reaching out and negotiating.

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 5 --

YouTube Influencer Checklist
Use the checklists below to search for YouTube influencers
for your brand and decide on the type of content you’ll get
them to create for your brand. Then jot down your top five
influencer prospects in the spaces provided.
Influencer Search
❏ 	Perform a keyword search for topics similar to your
product
❏ 	Find influencers for other brand in your category
❏ 	Use the “Up Next” sidebar to find related videos
❏ 	Search featured lists of YouTubers in your topic area
YouTube Video Formats
❏ 	Reviews
❏ 	Most Recommended
❏ 	How-To’s
❏ 	Tutorials
❏ 	Joint Giveaways
❏ 	Unboxing videos
❏ 	Influencer Prospects
